report_name: NSA Official: Adversaries Are Using AI and Stealth Tactics, Requiring Deeper Intelligence Integration

identities.name: National Security Agency
identities.description: U.S. government agency whose Cybersecurity Directorate's COO, Daniel McCormack, discussed evolving adversary tactics, including the use of AI and stealth methods.

identities.name: AFCEA International
identities.description: The organization that hosted the TechNet Cyber conference where the NSA official's remarks were made.

identities.name: Daniel McCormack
identities.description: The Chief Operations Officer of the NSA's Cybersecurity Directorate who warned about adversaries shifting to stealthier tactics and leveraging AI for attacks.
